title: Build HTML summary report generator
description: Generate a self-contained HTML report from summary.json. Must include: visitor name, demo duration, products shown (with screenshots), interest areas, recommended follow-up, V1 tenant link (prominent), key moments with clickable screenshots. All CSS/images inline (no external deps). Email-ready. Dark mode. Adapt v1-helper report generator HTML template patterns. Upload to S3 as output/summary.html.

substeps.title: Create render-report.html template with {{placeholder}} syntax
substeps.notes: 10 sections: header, visitor info, exec summary, timeline, products, interests, pain points, follow-up cards, score ring, SDR notes. Full print CSS.

substeps.title: Refactor render-report.js to use template
substeps.notes: Loads template, builds HTML fragments for repeating sections, replaces placeholders. Also reads timeline.json for merged click+speech events.

tests: Generated HTML opens in browser without errors
All images are inline base64 (no broken external refs)
V1 tenant link is clickable and prominent
Screenshots in key moments are visible and correctly referenced
HTML file size under 5MB for a 15-minute session
Renders correctly in Outlook email preview (basic HTML compat)
